title: Vocational School of Health Services Quality Program
content:
Vocational School of Health Services Quality Program

Planning the Mission and Objectives of the School.

Application of Management and Organization processes to achieve the Mission and Objectives of the School.

Establishment and control of assurances that the college has achieved its Mission and Objectives.

Continuous improvement measures to maintain the college's development and competitive advantage.
